title: Your first agent configuration with MCP and Looker
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial on building AI-powered agents using the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrated with Looker for enterprise data grounding. Covers MCP configuration, Looker API setup, Python environment configuration, and creating functional agents that translate prompts into data requests.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through configuring a first AI agent using the Agent Development Kit and the Model Context Protocol (MCP), connected to Looker for enterprise data grounding. It covers MCP configuration, Looker API setup, and Python environment configuration, then builds functional agents that translate prompts into data requests. The grounding in Looker matters because it ties agent output to enterprise data rather than ungrounded model responses. Related concepts include the MCP Toolbox for Databases and multi-agent systems.
